prompt: Create a Logseq project page for 'Projects/WebApp' with sub-pages 'Projects/WebApp/Architecture' and 'Projects/WebApp/Tasks'. The main project page should have tags (project, active), a status property set to 'in-progress', and link to its sub-pages. The Architecture page should describe a React + Node.js stack. The Tasks page should have 3 tasks with different priorities.
assertions: main-page-file: Creates pages/Projects___WebApp.md with triple-underscore namespace
page-tags-property: Main page has tags:: property with project and active
page-status-property: Main page has status:: in-progress property
double-colon-props: Properties use double-colon syntax (key:: value), not single colon
page-props-no-bullet: Page-level properties at file top are NOT prefixed with '- '
subpage-links: Main page links to sub-pages using [[Projects/WebApp/Architecture]] syntax
outliner-syntax: All content blocks (non-property lines) start with '- ' bullet prefix
tasks-with-priorities: Tasks page has tasks with different priority levels [#A], [#B], [#C]
